user.title: BTicino Classe 100X — SIP Credentials
user.description: Enter the SIP account details obtained from the provisioning script.

certificates.title: BTicino Classe 100X — mTLS Certificate Paths
certificates.description: Enter the **full paths** to the PEM files on your Home Assistant instance (e.g. `/config/bticino_certs/client.cert.pem`). Copy the three files there first via Samba, SCP, or the File Editor add-on.

data.client_cert: Client Certificate — full path to .pem file
data.client_key: Private Key — full path to .pem file
data.ca_cert: CA Certificate — full path to .pem file

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to vdesip.bs.iotleg.com:5228. Check that the certificate is valid and not expired.
error.invalid_cert: Invalid certificate or key. Check the file contents are valid PEM.
error.file_not_found: One or more files not found. Check the paths are correct and accessible from Home Assistant.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
